name: XX-Saber Fulhelmknight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＸＸ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダブルエックス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セイバー フラムナイト
desc: Once while face-up on the field, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can target the attacking monster; negate that attack. If this card destroys an opponent's Defense Position monster by battle: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "X-Saber" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: Once while face-up on the field, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can target the attacking monster; negate that attack. If this card destroys an opponent's Defense Position monster by battle: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "X-Saber" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
eff: Once while face-up on the field, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can target the attacking monster; negate that attack. If this card destroys an opponent's Defense Position monster by battle: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "X-Saber" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: Once while face-up on the field
